common.name: Name
common.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
common.checkConnection: Please check your internet connection and try again.

auth.title: Tapee
auth.subtitle: Event payment system
auth.fillFields: Please enter your email or username and password
auth.rememberMeHint: Your session will be saved securely on this device
auth.profileError: Could not load profile. Please try again.
auth.attendeeNotAllowed: Attendee accounts must log in via the attendee app.

passcode.createPinHint: Choose a PIN to protect access
passcode.confirmPinHint: Enter the same PIN to confirm
passcode.pinMismatch: PINs don't match, please try again
passcode.promptHint: Add a 4-digit PIN to protect access to the app

attendee.tapBracelet: Tap your bracelet to see balance
attendee.tapForHistory: Tap your bracelet to see history

attendeeHome.linkBraceletHint: Visit the Bank station to get your bracelet, then link it here.
attendeeHome.blockedHint: This bracelet is blocked. Go to the Bank station to unblock it.

attendeeBlock.title: Block bracelet
attendeeBlock.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to block this bracelet? No payments can be made with it until you go to the Bank station to unblock it.
attendeeBlock.blockedMessage: Your bracelet has been blocked. To unblock it, go to the Bank station and verify your identity.
attendeeBlock.warning1: You will not be able to make purchases at any stand.
attendeeBlock.warning2: The bracelet can only be unblocked at the Bank station with identity verification.
attendeeBlock.warning3: Your balance is safe and will not be lost.
attendeeBlock.unlockInfo: To unblock your bracelet, visit the Bank station. Staff will verify your identity before reactivating it.

attendeeRefund.title: Request refund
attendeeRefund.pendingInfo: Your request will be reviewed by the Bank team. Refunds are processed at the end of the event or within 48 hours.
attendeeRefund.confirmMessage: Submit a refund request for your remaining balance?
attendeeRefund.successMessage: Your refund request has been submitted. The Bank team will contact you once it is processed.
attendeeRefund.alreadyPendingMessage: You already have a pending refund request for this wristband. Please wait for it to be processed.

attendeeLink.title: Link bracelet
attendeeLink.instructionsDetail: Tap your bracelet to link it to your account. You must have received your bracelet at the Bank station first.
attendeeLink.successMessage: Your bracelet is now linked to your account. You can view your balance and history here.

bankRefundRequests.title: Refund requests
bankRefundRequests.tapToFinalizeSubtitle: Hold the bracelet close to zero the chip balance
bankRefundRequests.skipChipZeroWarning: The chip was not zeroed. Offline merchants may still see a balance until they sync.

bankTransfer.title: Transfer balance
bankTransfer.confirmMessage: Transfer {{amount}} from the blocked bracelet to the new one?
bankTransfer.successMessage: The balance has been transferred to the new bracelet.
bankTransfer.oldBraceletMustBeBlocked: The old bracelet must be blocked before transferring.

bank.title: Bank Station
bank.lookupSubtitle: Hold the bracelet against the phone to check the balance
bank.nfcWriteWarning: Top-up saved. Could not write to bracelet — hold it close to sync on the next charge.
bank.tapToWriteHint: Hold the bracelet flat against the back of the phone — it will write automatically.
bank.writeRetryHint: Write failed. Make sure the card is flat against the phone and try again.
bank.noSigningKey: Signing key not available. Please connect to the network first.
bank.savedOffline: Top-up queued for sync. Will be synced when online.
bank.nfcRequired: This device does not support NFC. A bracelet must be written before a top-up can be recorded.
bank.wrongEventDetail: This bracelet belongs to a different event and cannot be topped up here.

pos.title: Point of Sale
pos.barcodeScanBar: Scan barcode to add to cart
pos.scanError: Could not read bracelet. Try again.
pos.offlineLimitDetail: Unsynced spend: {{spent}} of {{limit}} allowed. Please sync before continuing.
pos.desfireNoKey: DESFire AES key not configured. Contact your event administrator.
pos.wrongEventDetail: This bracelet belongs to a different event or the event is closed. The charge cannot be processed.
pos.tipSubtitle: Select a tip percentage for the staff at this location

merchant_admin.title: Merchant Panel
merchant_admin.deactivateLocationConfirm: Deactivate "{{name}}"? It will no longer appear in active lists.
merchant_admin.removeStaffConfirm: Remove {{name}} from your team? They will lose access immediately.
merchant_admin.staffLocationsSubtitle: No selection = access to all locations
merchant_admin.noProducts: No products yet. Add your first product.
merchant_admin.photoPermissionDenied: Permission to access photos was denied.
merchant_admin.noProductsYet: No active products yet. Add products in the Products tab first.
merchant_admin.setQtyAbsolute: How many units do you have?
merchant_admin.invalidQty: Please enter a valid quantity (0 or more).
merchant_admin.externalMerchantStockDesc: You manage your own inventory independently. Set stock levels directly without warehouse requests.
merchant_admin.typeEventManagedHint: Inventory dispatched from warehouse. Warehouse team manages stock levels.
merchant_admin.typeExternalHint: Vendor manages their own inventory and product catalog independently.
merchant_admin.ivaExentoHint: Basic food basket or exempt products
merchant_admin.fiscalSettingsHint: These rates are applied to all sales from this merchant
merchant_admin.transferInvalidQty: Enter a valid quantity (1 or more).
merchant_admin.transferSameLocation: Origin and destination must be different.
merchant_admin.barcodeHint: Optional — leave blank if no barcode

warehouse.title: Warehouse
warehouse.emptyOrder: Add at least one product to the order
warehouse.barcodeNotFound: Product not found for this barcode
warehouse.auditSubtitle: Compare physical counts with the system
warehouse.auditEnterPhysical: Enter the physical count for each product
warehouse.damagedGoodsSubtitle: Log damaged, lost, or expired goods
warehouse.damagedGoodsSuccess: Damaged goods recorded and stock reduced

eventAdmin.noEvent: No event associated with your account
eventAdmin.selectMerchantForRole: Please select a merchant for this role
eventAdmin.inventoryModeLabel: How stock is managed for this event
eventAdmin.locationBasedDesc: Each location manages its own stock independently. No warehouse approval needed.
eventAdmin.centralizedWarehouseDesc: A central warehouse controls all stock. Locations must request restocks through the warehouse.
eventAdmin.inventoryModeWarning: Changing the inventory mode mid-event will affect active stock flows. Warehouse dispatch and restock orders will be enabled or disabled accordingly.
eventAdmin.selfManagedStockDesc: This event uses location-based inventory. Manage your stock directly without warehouse requests.
eventAdmin.locationBasedModeInfo: This event is configured for location-based inventory. Warehouse dispatch and restock orders are not available.
eventAdmin.promoterSummarySubtitle: Consolidated metrics across all your events
eventAdmin.noPromoterCompany: Your account is not linked to a promoter company
eventAdmin.hmacKeyDescription: HMAC key used to verify bracelet authenticity for this event
eventAdmin.signingKeyRotated: Signing key rotated. All POS devices must reconnect.
eventAdmin.rotateKeyWarning: Rotating the key will log out all POS devices for this event. Staff will need to sign in again.
eventAdmin.offlineLimitsDescription: Configure how much can be spent without syncing to the server
eventAdmin.offlineSyncLimitHint: Maximum accumulated amount on POS before requiring sync
eventAdmin.maxOfflineSpendHint: Offline transactions exceeding this amount will be flagged for review
eventAdmin.invalidLimitValues: Please enter valid values greater than 0
eventAdmin.flaggedBraceletsDescription: Bracelets automatically flagged for balance discrepancies or offline limit violations.
eventAdmin.noFlaggedBracelets: No flagged bracelets for this event.
eventAdmin.flaggedBracelets_alert: Tap to review in Event Settings
eventAdmin.nfcChipSettingsDescription: Select the NFC chip technology used by this event's wristbands
eventAdmin.ntag21xDesc: Standard NTAG chip. Compatible with all devices (iOS and Android).
eventAdmin.mifareClassicDesc: MIFARE Classic chip. Requires Android 6.0+ on POS and Bank devices.
eventAdmin.mifareClassicWarning: Make sure all POS and Bank devices support MIFARE Classic (Android 6.0+ recommended).
eventAdmin.mifareUltralightCDesc: Ultralight C chip with optional 3DES authentication. 144 bytes user memory. Android only for authenticated writes.
eventAdmin.nfcChipMismatch: Chip type mismatch: expected {{expected}}, detected {{detected}}. Transaction will proceed.
eventAdmin.desfireEv3Desc: Bank-grade NFC chip with AES-128 mutual authentication and anti-tearing protection.
eventAdmin.desfireEv3Compatibility: Requires Android 8.0+ with IsoDep support. Not compatible with iOS.
eventAdmin.desfireAesKeyDescription: AES-128 master key used for DESFire EV3 bracelet authentication and Transaction MAC generation
eventAdmin.desfireKeyGenerated: DESFire AES key generated. Format bracelets before the event.
eventAdmin.desfireKeyGenerateFailed: Failed to generate DESFire AES key
eventAdmin.desfireKeyConfirmDesc: This will generate a new AES-128 master key for DESFire EV3 bracelets. All bracelets must be reformatted with the new key.
eventAdmin.desfireKeyRotateWarning: Regenerating the AES key will require all DESFire bracelets to be reformatted. This cannot be undone.
eventAdmin.ultralightCDesKeyDescription: 16-byte 2TDEA key used for 3DES mutual authentication before write operations on Ultralight C bracelets
eventAdmin.ultralightCKeyGenerateFailed: Failed to generate Ultralight C 3DES key
eventAdmin.ultralightCKeyConfirmDesc: This will generate a new 16-byte 3DES key for MIFARE Ultralight C bracelets. Authentication will be required before all future writes.
eventAdmin.ultralightCKeyRotateWarning: Rotating the 3DES key will invalidate all existing Ultralight C bracelets. This cannot be undone.
eventAdmin.closeEventDescription: Permanently close this event. All bracelets will be blocked and automatic refund requests will be created for pending balances.
eventAdmin.closeEventWarning: This action cannot be undone. All bracelets will be blocked and the event cannot be reactivated.
eventAdmin.closeEventConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to close this event? All active bracelets will be blocked and refund requests will be created for pending balances.
eventAdmin.eventClosedDetail: The event has been closed. {{flagged}} bracelet(s) blocked and {{refunds}} refund request(s) created.
eventAdmin.closeEventPendingWarning: {{count}} pending refund request(s) must be resolved before closing. If you force close, these attendees will not receive their refunds automatically.
eventAdmin.closeEventRefundCheckFailed: Could not verify pending refund requests. Please retry before closing the event.
eventAdmin.deleteUserConfirm: Permanently delete {{name}}? This cannot be undone.
eventAdmin.blockUserConfirm: Block {{name}}? They won't be able to log in until unblocked.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Stock by location — tap a location to expand
inventory.noLocations: No locations found for this event
inventory.noProductsInLocation: No products in this location yet

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.commissionChangeNote: Note: changing the commission rate only affects future transactions. Past sales remain at the rate they were charged.
admin.deleteMerchantConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{{name}}"? This will also remove all their locations, products, and inventory. This cannot be undone.
admin.merchantHasTransactions: This merchant has transaction history and cannot be deleted. Deactivate it instead.
admin.eventFieldsRequired: Name, start and end dates are required
admin.endDateAfterStart: End date must be after start date
admin.deactivateLocationConfirm: Deactivate "{{name}}"? It will no longer appear in active lists.
admin.removeStaffConfirm: Remove this user from the location?
admin.staffAssignNote: Enter a user ID to assign them to this location. Assigned staff will be able to operate the POS at this location.
admin.billingHint: Platform commission earned per event (total sales × commission rate)
admin.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
admin.createClientHint: Creates an event organizer account for your client
admin.selectClientRequired: Please select a client to assign
admin.noClientsToAssign: No clients yet. Create a client first.
admin.pickLocationPrompt: Tap to set the event location on the map
admin.locationRequired: Please pick a location on the map before saving
admin.locationPermissionDenied: Location permission is required to use this feature.
admin.locationError: Could not get your current location.
admin.coordsHint: Open Google Maps, long-press your venue, then copy the coordinates shown at the bottom.
admin.mapsApiKeyMissingBody: Set GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY in your Replit project secrets to enable the interactive map picker.
admin.resetPasswordConfirm: Confirm password change for this user?
admin.scanOrEnterUid: Scan bracelet or enter UID manually
admin.braceletNotFound: Bracelet not found in the system
admin.unflagConfirm: Remove the ban on this bracelet and allow it to be used again?
admin.deleteRecordConfirm: Permanently delete this bracelet from the system? Transaction history is preserved. The physical card can be re-registered.
admin.noUidEntered: Please scan or enter a UID first
admin.resetBalanceConfirm: This will write zero to the bracelet's NFC tag and reset its balance in the system. Scan the bracelet to confirm.

syncIssues.title: Sync Issues
syncIssues.dismissConfirm: Permanently remove this failed transaction? This action cannot be undone. The bracelet write has already happened.
syncIssues.editAmountHint: Correct the amount and tap Retry to re-queue for sync.
syncIssues.invalidAmount: Please enter a valid amount greater than zero.
syncIssues.supervisorRequired: Only supervisors (admin or event admin) can void failed transactions.

errors.flaggedBracelet: Bracelet is blocked and cannot be used
errors.notRegistered: Bracelet not registered in the system

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.salesByHourSubtitle: Total revenue (COP) per hour of day
analytics.heatmapSubtitle: Transaction intensity by hour and day
analytics.notesPlaceholder: Optional notes for this restock request...
analytics.restockQtyRequired: Please enter a valid quantity greater than zero.

fraud.alertsSubtitle: Suspicious activity detected in this event
fraud.reportSuccessDetail: The report has been sent to the event admin.
fraud.descriptionHmacInvalid: HMAC verification failed for bracelet {{entityId}}. The bracelet was automatically quarantined and blocked from further transactions.
fraud.descriptionDoubleLocation: Bracelet {{entityId}} was detected at two different merchant locations within a short time window. Possible cloning or relay attack.
fraud.descriptionOfflineVolume: An unusual number of offline transactions was recorded for {{entityId}}. This may indicate manipulation of the offline counter.
fraud.descriptionHighValueStaff: Staff member {{entityId}} processed one or more unusually high-value transactions. Manual review recommended.
fraud.descriptionBalanceIncrease: The balance of bracelet {{entityId}} increased without a corresponding top-up record. Possible unauthorized credit injection.
fraud.descriptionManualReport: A manual report was submitted for {{entityId}}. Review the attached notes for details.

wristbands.title: Wristbands
wristbands.searchPlaceholder: Search by NFC UID or name...
wristbands.empty: No wristbands registered for this event

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.empty: No transactions found for this event

gate.title: Gate Station
gate.readyHint: Scan a wristband to register it to this event. You can register many bracelets in rapid succession.
gate.registerWristbandHint: Tap to scan a new wristband and register it
gate.tapWristbandHint: Hold the wristband against the back of your phone to scan it.
gate.tapWristbandForCheck: Hold the wristband against the back of your phone to check access.
gate.scanningHint: Keep the wristband close to the back of your phone.
gate.manualUidHint: Enter the code printed on the wristband (4, 7 or 10 hex bytes).
gate.registerSuccessHint: The wristband is now registered. Ready for the next one.
gate.scanFailed: NFC scan failed. Please try again.
gate.noZoneWarning: No zone assigned. Contact your event admin.
gate.securityCheckHint: Verify a wristband has access to your zone
gate.alreadyRegisteredHint: This wristband was already registered at a previous time for this event.

zones.title: Access Zones
zones.empty: No zones defined for this event.
zones.deleteConfirm: Delete zone "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
zones.rankHint: Sets the access level. Higher number = more exclusive zone. E.g. General = 0, VIP = 1, Backstage = 2. Higher-rank zones include access to all lower-rank zones.
zones.upgradePriceHint: Amount in Colombian pesos (COP) the attendee pays at the bank station to upgrade their bracelet to this zone. Leave empty or 0 if the upgrade is free.
zones.nameHint: E.g. General, Field, Bleachers, VIP, Backstage, Dressing Rooms.
zones.rankInvalid: Rank must be a valid non-negative number
zones.priceInvalid: Upgrade price must be a valid non-negative number
zones.maxAccessLevelHint: This wristband already has access to all available zones.
zones.nfcWriteFailed: Access upgraded on server, but NFC write failed. The bracelet may need to be re-tapped at the gate.

checkBalance.title: Check Bracelet
checkBalance.subtitle: Scan any bracelet to see its balance and recent charges
checkBalance.noTx: No transactions found for this bracelet
checkBalance.nfcNotSupported: NFC is not available on this device
checkBalance.wrongBracelet: Wrong bracelet scanned — please scan the same bracelet again
checkBalance.resetBalanceConfirm: This will write 0 to the bracelet's NFC tag and reset its balance in the system. Scan the bracelet to confirm.
checkBalance.resetBalanceError: Failed to reset balance. Please try again.
